# websiteCookies | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Safari Services ](/documentation/safariservices)

- [ SFAddToHomeScreenInfo ](/documentation/safariservices/sfaddtohomescreeninfo)

- [ websiteCookies ](/documentation/safariservices/sfaddtohomescreeninfo/websitecookies)

- [ SFAddToHomeScreenInfo ](/documentation/safariservices/sfaddtohomescreeninfo)

-  websiteCookies 

Instance Property# websiteCookies

iOS 18.2+iPadOS 18.2+visionOS 2.2+

```
var websiteCookies: [HTTPCookie] { get set }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/safariservices/sfaddtohomescreeninfo/websitecookies#discussion)

An optional item for providing the website’s cookies. These will be copied to the Home Screen web app’s data store. This will only be used if the manifest is non-nil and a Home Screen web app is created, not a Home Screen Bookmark.

An array of cookies for the system to use when it accesses the web app.
